case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. ITALO ALEXANDRE MENDEZ DE MEDEIROS FERREIRA

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED FEB-17-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FERREIRA, ITALO ALEXANDRE MENDEZ DE MEDEIROS
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-11-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FERREIRA, ITALO ALEXANDRE MENDEZ DE MEDEIROS $1,012.46 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,097.46, ON DELINQUENT LOAN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-11-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-11-2018 BY CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY MARIA BLANC, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CECILIA P. CASTELLANOS; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,012.46 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT FERREIRA, ITALO ALEXANDRE MENDEZ DE MEDEIROS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-11-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 04/11/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTMEPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FOREARD."
